title: sida corrugata var. orbicularis
intro: Sida corrugata var. orbicularis, also known as the corrugated sida or sida orbicularis, is a plant species that belongs to the Malvaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Sida corrugata var. orbicularis include its use as an anti-inflammatory agent, a treatment for wounds and skin conditions, and a remedy for digestive problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or an infusion, and its herbal preparations are used in folk medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
